description: You are designing an LED flasher and need to verify the timing. Using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, calculate the output parameters for a 555 Timer circuit in Astable mode with component values R1: 10 kΩ, R2: 47 kΩ, and C: 10 μF. Record the Frequency_Hz, Duty_Cycle_Percent, Time_High_ms, and Time_Low_ms (rounded to 2 decimal places) to /sdcard/555_timer_results.txt.
